tracks.rawText: 2:56PAZ AMOR Y RESPETOv5.5Roots reggae with a one-drop drum beat, deep skanking offbeat guitar, bubbling organ, and a heavy bassline drop, Dub cinematic textures with spring reverb, tape delay throws, filtered tom echoes, and wide stereo space, Global bass layer adds sub drops, percussion from multiple regions, and a quiet-break section where the heaviest bar lands for maximum impact4PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 0:40[Rec] May 22 01:38:08UploadK-pop synth-pop hybrid featuring bright, digital synthesizers and a driving electronic beat, The arrangement centers on a staccato, high-pitched synth lead playing a repetitive, syncopated melodic hook, A clean, punchy kick drum and sharp snare provide a steady 4/4 rhythm, Layered synth pads and occasional digital sound effects create a dense, polished texture, The tempo is 128 BPM in the key of C major, The track features a high-energy, polished production style typical of modern Korean pop music, with rapid melodic shifts and a focus on catchy, repetitive synth motifs1PublishRemix
tracks.title: [Rec] May 22 01:38:08

tracks.rawText: 2:36Danae Mendozav5.5Dark reggaeton at 95 BPM with a racing dembow kick-snare, rattling claves, and grimy 808 sub-bass chasing the pocket, Detuned synth brass, minor-key pads, and filtered bell plucks add tension; tight reggaeton percussion, reverse FX, and delay throws on vocal chops keep the groove breathless and close1PublishRemix
tracks.title: Danae Mendoza

tracks.rawText: 2:24Studio Selectionv5.5CoverReggae dub dancehall built around a single percussive drip/click motif, looped and time-stretched into the hook, Skanking electric guitar chops, spring-reverb snare, deep one-drop kick, wobbling tape-delay throws, fat sub-bass, and chopped conga accents, Gritty mix, filter sweeps, vinyl crackle, spacious stereo dub edits3PublishRemix
